closed_theorem.name: Cantor's theorem
closed_theorem.statement: For every type alpha, no function alpha -> Set alpha is surjective.

methodology_role: Benchmark object showing that the repository can certify a fully closed theorem while preserving frontier nonclaim boundaries.
allowed_claims: The repository contains a Lean-checked closed-theorem demo.
The demo uses a known Mathlib Cantor theorem as a trusted library anchor.
The verifier infrastructure can distinguish a closed theorem from frontier nonclaims.
forbidden_claims: This proves that the boundary method solves open problems.
This measures efficiency without a defined baseline.
